hero_and_general.intended_use: Website hero banner - luxury apartment with radiators
hero_and_general.prompt: A panoramic view of a modern luxury apartment with elegant white steel radiators under floor-to-ceiling windows, warm golden hour lighting, premium interior design, cinematic photography
Interior of a modern radiator manufacturing factory, robotic welding arms, automated production line, steel panels, industrial photography, clean and organized, blue safety lighting
Aerial view of a large modern manufacturing facility, 45000 square meters, industrial park, organized buildings, professional corporate photography
Quality control testing in a radiator factory, pressure testing equipment, engineer checking gauges, professional industrial photography
Modern corporate office reception area of a manufacturing company, clean design, company branding, professional business photography

product_categories.prompt: An elegant designer steel radiator with artistic welded joint pattern in a contemporary loft apartment, vertical tall radiator, matte white finish, interior design photography
A classic white 3-column steel radiator installed in a traditional European hallway, period architecture, warm ambient lighting, product photography
A modern chrome heated towel rail radiator in a luxury marble bathroom, fluffy white towels hanging, spa atmosphere, interior photography
A copper-aluminum bimetal radiator in a modern minimalist bedroom, sectional design, warm tones, cozy atmosphere, product showcase photography
A sleek white steel panel radiator (Type 22, double panel) under a window in a bright modern kitchen, clean lines, Scandinavian design, product photography

room_scenes.prompt: A spacious modern living room with a white steel panel radiator under a large window, comfortable sofa, warm winter scene outside, cozy interior, professional photography
A cozy master bedroom with a white column radiator, soft warm lighting, winter evening, comfortable bedding, Scandinavian interior design photography
A luxury bathroom with a chrome heated towel radiator, marble tiles, rainfall shower, warm steam, spa-like atmosphere, interior photography
A modern office space with white steel panel radiators along the window wall, workstations, natural daylight, professional corporate interior photography
An upscale hotel lobby with designer vertical radiators as architectural features, elegant marble floor, warm ambient lighting, hospitality interior photography

article_illustrations.prompt: Multiple different styles of steel radiators displayed in a showroom, various sizes and designs, professional product display, clean white background, comparison photography

article_illustrations.intended_use: Article: Steel vs bimetal radiator comparison
article_illustrations.prompt: Side by side comparison of a steel panel radiator and a copper-aluminum bimetal radiator cross-section, technical cutaway view, engineering illustration style, clean background

article_illustrations.intended_use: Article: Factory story / behind the scenes
article_illustrations.prompt: Workers in a modern radiator factory, automated welding line, quality inspection, team collaboration, industrial documentary photography
A bright summer renovation scene, an installer fitting a white radiator under a window in a partially decorated room, tools visible, natural daylight, documentary photography
An architect reviewing floor plans with heating layout markings, radiator placement diagrams on blueprints, professional workspace, engineering photography
Close-up of steel surface treatment process, acid washing and phosphating tanks in a factory, chemical processing line, industrial macro photography

article_illustrations.intended_use: Article: Central heating vs independent heating comparison
article_illustrations.prompt: Split image concept: left side shows a large apartment building with central heating pipes, right side shows a modern home with a wall-hung gas boiler, comparison illustration
Professional HVAC technician installing a white steel radiator, copper pipes, pipe wrench and tools, clean installation work, documentary photography

article_illustrations.intended_use: Article: European heating style / design inspiration
article_illustrations.prompt: A beautiful European apartment interior in Paris or London with classic white column radiators, period windows, hardwood floors, warm lighting, lifestyle photography
Professional quality certification process, CE marking documentation, laboratory testing equipment, official certification stamps, corporate documentation photography

notes.original_hero_banner: Originally specified as 21:9 but Kling API v1 does not support that ratio; generated as 16:9 instead
